title: Intent fragmentation: brain ActionIntent vs dashboard NL commands
summary: Operator phrases were classified unknown in POST /dashboard/command/execute while the brain returned action_intent none for the same natural language. Root cause: two parallel intent surfaces (Groq dashboard executor vs council JSON) without shared canonical actions, keyword fallbacks, or a mapping bridge. Remediation: (1) Extend dashboard _SYSTEM_PROMPT and handlers for trigger_solar_research and inventory_adjust. (2) Add core/intent_execution.py mapping ActionIntent to dashboard parsed dicts. (3) Orchestrator post-parse heuristics for sell, update_stock (add/remove), and solar research calling services/market_research_service. (4) sale_intent_heuristic expanded sell regex (items/units/pcs) plus stock-add/remove patterns. (5) Introduce TriggerSolarResearchAction (inline Tavily; HITL queue returns no_action). Single lesson: new operator intents must be registered in dashboard actions, brain union or heuristics, and execution_engine policy in one change-set to avoid drift.
